observed_public_information: 2026 season departures from June 6 to September 19
Daily departures from June 6 through September 13
Gjendesheim to Memurubu is the common Besseggen boat leg
Shuttle buses run Odda - P1 Tyssedal - P2 Skjeggedal
Second bus runs P2 Skjeggedal - P3 Magelitopp
Romsdalseggen bus shuttle operates from mid June to mid October
Online booking is required/recommended through NOR-WAY
